heading_content_part: WebComics

decoder_heading: Privacy Policy
ident_heading: Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyPrivacy PolicyIn WebComics, we pay great attention to your private information. We hope you will understand how WebComics uses your information while using WebComics services. Therefore, I hope you will take the time to read the following policy carefully.

decoder_heading: Information Collected or Received from You
ident_heading: Information collected or received from you
heading_content_part: Information collected or received from youWe collect and process basic information for running our business and provide our service to you. You can usually choose what information you want to provide, but in some cases we need to require some certain information which help not only you use but also us provide service.We collect or receive information in a few different ways, depending on what services you use and how you use them:

decoder_heading: 1. Information Provided by You
ident_heading: 1. Information provided by you
heading_content_part: 1. Information provided by youWe collect information you provide when you create a WebComics account, upload content, or otherwise use the service, including:

decoder_heading: a. Identification Information
ident_heading: a. Identification information
heading_content_part: a. Identification information.For example, your email address, username, and authentication credentials used to sign up or log in. If you choose to add a photo, location, or other optional details to your profile, you should be aware that such information is public, and therefore visible to anyone who visits your profile page. And in the future, we will launch the online personal home page. It may also be visible to anyone who visits your personal home page, although we will provide the invisible setting option.

decoder_heading: b. Information about Trading in WebComics
ident_heading: b. Information about trading in WebComics
heading_content_part: b. Information about trading in WebComics.

decoder_heading: b. Information about Trading in WebComics
ident_heading: b. Information about trading in WebComics
heading_content_part: If you purchase or carry out other transactions (such as exchanging commodities in real) in WebComics, we will collect information about these purchases or transactions. This information includes your payment information, such as order information of Google play and Apple store, and distribution and contact information, such as Full name, Country, State, Province, Region, City, Address line, Email address, Zip code and Phone number. We use this information to check your consumption and logistics distribution.

decoder_heading: c. The Using Situation of You
ident_heading: c. The using situation of you
heading_content_part: c. The using situation of you.We collect how you use the information of our product, such as the content and type of activities, the functions used, the operation of the execution, the accounts interacting with others and your online time, frequency, and length of your online time. This information enables us to optimize our product services and allow you to recognize products.

decoder_heading: 2. Information Collected from the Service You Use
ident_heading: 2. Information collected from the service you use
heading_content_part: 2. Information collected from the service you useWe collect information about you and the devices you use to access the service, such as your computer, mobile phone, or tablet.The information that we collect includes:

decoder_heading: a. Device Information
ident_heading: a. Device information
heading_content_part: a. Device information.We may collect device-specific information (such as your hardware model, operating system version,unique device identifiers, and mobile network information including phone number). WebComics Media may associate your device identifiers or phone number with your WebComics user account.

decoder_heading: b. Log Information
ident_heading: b. Log information
heading_content_part: b. Log information.When you use our services or view content provided on the service, we may automatically collect and store certain information inserver logs. This may include:Details of how you used our service, such as your search queries, reading history, bookmarks, and transaction history;Internet protocol (IP) address;Device event information such as crashes, system activity, hardware settings, browser type, browser language, the date and time of your request and referral URL;

decoder_heading: b. Log Information
ident_heading: b. Log information
heading_content_part: Cookies that may uniquely identify your browser or your WebComics user account.

decoder_heading: c. Location Information
ident_heading: c. Location information
heading_content_part: c. Location information.When you use a location-enabled device, we may collect and process information about your approximate location, like the GPS signals sent by a mobile device. We may also use various technologies to determine approximate location, such as sensor data from your device that may, for example, provide information on nearby Wi-Fi access points and cell towers, for advertising, analytics, or to protect access to content that is geo-locked due to regional licensing restrictions.

decoder_heading: d. Unique Application Numbers
ident_heading: d. Unique application numbers
heading_content_part: d. Unique application numbers.Certain services include a unique application number. This number and information about your installation (for example, the operating system type and application version number) may be sent to WebComics Media when you install or uninstall that service or when that service periodically contacts our servers, such as for automatic or required updates.

decoder_heading: e. Local Storage
ident_heading: e. Local storage
heading_content_part: e. Local storage.We may collect and store information (including personal information) locally on your device using mechanisms such as browser web storage (including HTML 5) and application data caches.

decoder_heading: f. Cookies and Anonymous Identifiers
ident_heading: f. Cookies and anonymous identifiers
heading_content_part: f. Cookies and anonymous identifiers.We use various technologies to collect and store information when you visit our services, and this may include sending one or more cookies or anonymous identifiers to your device. We also usecookiesandanonymous identifierswhen you interact with services we offer to our partners, such as advertising services or WebComics Media features that may appear on other sites.

decoder_heading: 3. Information from Third Parties
ident_heading: 3. Information from Third Parties
heading_content_part: 3. Information from Third PartiesSome members or visitors may choose to connect to WebComics or register a WebComics account by using an external third-party application, such as Facebook, Twitter and Google. Connecting your WebComics account to third-party applications or services is optional. If you choose to connect your account to a third-party application, WebComics may receive information from that application and use it as part of providing our Services to you.For example:

decoder_heading: a. Account Creation and Authentication
ident_heading: a. Account creation and authentication
heading_content_part: a. Account creation and authentication.If you sign up for a WebComics account using Facebook, Twitter or Google, we receive your email address, photo, and other public profile information, which is then used to create your WebComics profile and subsequent log in authentication.

decoder_heading: Your Choices
ident_heading: your choices
heading_content_part: your choices.Your choicesPeople have different personal privacy concerns. Our goal is to be clear about what information we collect, so that you can make meaningful choices about how it is used.Here are some of your choices related to personal privacy:

decoder_heading: 1. You Can Provide, Edit, or Remove Certain Information from Your Public Profile
ident_heading: 1. You can provide, edit, or remove certain information from your public profile
heading_content_part: 1. You can provide, edit, or remove certain information from your public profile by editing your profile. You may also change or correct your private WebComics account information through your account settings.

decoder_heading: 2. Many of Our Services Let You Choose to Share Information with Others
ident_heading: 2. Many of our Services let you choose to share information with others
heading_content_part: 2. Many of our Services let you choose to share information with others. Remember that when you share information publicly, it may be indexable by search engines such as Google or Bing.

decoder_heading: 3. We Partner with Third Parties to Manage Our Advertising
ident_heading: 3. We partner with third parties to manage our advertising
heading_content_part: 3. We partner with third parties to manage our advertising. Our third-party partners may use cookies or similar technologies in order to provide you with advertising based upon your browsing activities and interests. If you wish to opt out of interest-based advertising, please visit https://www.mobvista.com/en/. We still have to remind you that you might continue to receive generic ads.

decoder_heading: 4. If You No Longer Wish to Use the Services or Receive Service-Related Communications
ident_heading: 4. If you no longer wish to use the Services or receive service-related communications
heading_content_part: 4. If you no longer wish to use the Services or receive service-related communications (except for legally required notices), then you may delete your account. You can contact us by Email to delete your account. Our Email address:[email protected]

decoder_heading: 5. Be Aware That Any Personal Information That You Choose to Share in Public Spaces
ident_heading: 5. Be aware that any personal information that you choose to share in public spaces
heading_content_part: 5. Be aware that any personal information that you choose to share in public spaces such as comments or profile walls can be read, collected, or used by others, or could be used to send unsolicited messages to you. WebComics generally does not remove content from public spaces, so some of your posts or comments may remain public even after your account is deleted, though your name and profile photo will no longer be displayed alongside any posts. You are responsible for the personal information that you choose to post in public spaces through the Services.

ident_heading: 6. If your personal information is wrong, we strive to give you ways to update it quickly or to remove it
heading_content_part: 6. If your personal information is wrong, we strive to give you ways to update it quickly or to remove it — unless we are required to retain that information for legitimate business or legal purposes. When updating your personal information, we may ask you to verify your identity before we can act on your request.

decoder_heading: 6. If Your Personal Information Is Wrong, We Strive to Give You Ways to Update It Quickly or to Remove It
ident_heading: 6. If your personal information is wrong, we strive to give you ways to update it quickly or to remove it
heading_content_part: 7. Where we can provide information access and correction, we will do so for free, except where it would require a disproportionate effort. We aim to maintain our services in a manner that protects information from accidental or malicious destruction. Because of this, after you delete information from our services, we may not immediately delete residual copies from our active servers and may not remove information from our backup systems. Please note that we may reject requests that are unreasonably repetitive, require disproportionate technical effort (for example, developing a new system or fundamentally changing an existing practice), risk the privacy of others, or would be extremely impractical (for instance, requests concerning information residing on backup tapes).

heading_content_part: 5.Be aware that any personal information that you choose to share in public spaces such as comments or profile walls can be read, collected, or used by others, or could be used to send unsolicited messages to you. WebComics generally does not remove content from public spaces, so some of your posts or comments may remain public even after your account is deleted, though your name and profile photo will no longer be displayed alongside any posts. You are responsible for the personal information that you choose to post in public spaces through the Services.

heading_content_part: 7. Where we can provide information access and correction, we will do so for free, except where it would require a disproportionate effort. We aim to maintain our services in a manner that protects information from accidental or malicious destruction. Because of this, after you delete information from our services, we may not immediately delete residual copies from our active servers and may not remove information from our backup systems. Please note that we may reject requests that are unreasonably repetitive, require disproportionate technical effort (for example, developing a new system or fundamentally changing an existing practice), risk the privacy of others, or would be extremely impractical (for instance, requests concerning information residing on backup tapes).
